results.name: counter fuel
results.description: Remove counters to do something.

results.name: counter fuel-aesthetic
results.description: These cards remove counters with no rules meaning as fuel.

results.name: counter fuel-any
results.description: Use any type of counter as fuel.

results.name: counter fuel-other
results.description: Use other permanents' counters as fuel.

results.name: counter fuel-pt
results.description: These cards remove deprecated P/T counters as fuel.

results.name: countermagic
results.description: Disruption of casting.

results.name: counter preservation
results.description: When something else leaves, put its counters on another thing

results.name: counter preservation-self
results.description: When this thing leaves, put its counters on something else you control.

results.name: counterspell
results.description: Spells that counter stuff. See child tags for variants on the behaviour; notably [counterspell-soft](/tags/card/counterspell-soft) which gives the opponent a buyout cost.

results.name: counterspell-ability
results.description: Cards that counter activated/triggered abilities. NOT for abilities that counter things.

results.name: counterspell-artifact
results.description: Counterspells that call out artifacts specifically.

results.name: counterspell-automatic
results.description: Cards that will automatically try to counter spells.

results.name: counterspell-bounce
results.description: Counterspells that instead "counter" by bouncing the spell.

results.name: counterspell-creature
results.description: Counterspells that call out creatures specifically.

results.name: counterspell-enchantment
results.description: Counterspells that call out enchantments specifically.

results.name: counterspell-exile
results.description: For counterspelling that exiles the spell.

results.name: counterspell-free
results.description: Counterspells that can be cast right now with no mana cost (even if they might incur some alternate/later cost).

results.name: counterspell-instant
results.description: Counterspells that call out instants specifically.

results.name: counterspell-noncreature
results.description: Counterspells that call out noncreatures specifically.

results.name: counterspell-reusable
results.description: Counterspell spells and abilities you can use again and again.

results.name: counterspell-sacrifice
results.description: Counterspell abilities that require sacrifice as a cost.

results.name: counterspell-soft
results.description: A "soft counterspell" gives the other player a chance to buy off the counter, such as with a mana payment.

results.name: counterspell-sorcery
results.description: Counterspells that call out sorceries specifically.

results.name: counterspell-sweeper
results.description: Counter ALL the things!

results.name: counterspell-tuck
results.description: Counter a spell by putting it into its owner's library.

results.name: counters remain
results.description: Counters don't leave when they normally would.

results.name: counts as a type
results.description: Cards that used the deprecated "counts as a ..." language in their early prints.

results.name: court street
results.description: A street on Ravnica.

results.name: cover card
results.description: Cards that are meant to cover face down cards.

results.name: cr 107.3f x card
results.description: 107.3f - Sometimes X appears in the text of a spell or ability but not in a mana cost, alternative cost, additional cost, or activation cost. If the value of X isn’t defined, the controller of the spell or ability chooses the value of X at the appropriate time.

results.name: cracked earth
results.description: earth cracked due to dryness

results.name: crags
results.description: steep, spiked or rugged cliff or rock faces

results.name: cranial plating
results.description: Buffs based on the number of artifacts or Equipment you control/in play. See also [armament ability](armament-ability). For the enchantment version, see [ethereal armor](ethereal-armor).

results.name: cravat
results.description: A style of tie (maybe frilly) worn around the neck.
